items.caption:
A bustling food court scene at brass mill center. the foreground is dominated by a woman in a black coat, standing at the counter of a pizza place, her attention seemingly drawn to the menu. the counter, adorned with a vibrant red and yellow sign, is a focal point in the image. 

in the background, a variety of food options are visible, each with their own distinct signage. the colors of the signs add to the lively atmosphere of the food court. the people in the background are blurred, indicating movement and activity typical of a busy food court. the overall scene suggests a typical day at a popular shopping mall food court, with patrons enjoying a variety of dining options.
